subcodes.first_line: O ye Baha'ís! There is no greater title in this world so that I may call you; for to be known as a Baha'í, it means to be a heavenly
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بهائیان عنوانی اعظم از این نیست تا شما را بان بخوانم زیرا بهائی یعنی شخصی
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @power of prayer, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life
